mapper.select:
SELECT TBP.ID, TBP.POST_TITLE, TBP.POST_CONTENT, TBP.POST_READ_COUNT, TBM.MEMBER_EMAIL, TBM.MEMBER_NAME FROM TBL_POST TBP JOIN TBL_MEMBER TBM ON TBP.MEMBER_ID = TBM.ID /* 동적 쿼리(최신순, 조회순) */
ORDER BY TBP.ID ASC
ORDER BY TBP.POST_READ_COUNT DESC
ORDER BY TBP.ID DESC

SELECT TBP.ID, TBP.POST_TITLE, TBP.POST_CONTENT, TBP.MEMBER_ID, TBP.POST_READ_COUNT, TBM.MEMBER_EMAIL, TBM.MEMBER_NAME FROM TBL_POST TBP JOIN TBL_MEMBER TBM ON TBP.MEMBER_ID = TBM.ID AND TBP.ID = #{id}
mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_POST.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TBL_POST(ID, POST_TITLE, POST_CONTENT, MEMBER_ID) VALUES(#{id}, #{postTitle}, #{postContent}, #{memberId})
